import type { ContextualKeyword } from "../tokenizer/keywords"; import { type TokenType } from "../tokenizer/types"; export declare function isContextual(contextualKeyword: ContextualKeyword): boolean; export declare function isLookaheadContextual(contextualKeyword: ContextualKeyword): boolean; export declare function eatContextual(contextualKeyword: ContextualKeyword): boolean; export declare function expectContextual(contextualKeyword: ContextualKeyword): void; export declare function canInsertSemicolon(): boolean; export declare function hasPrecedingLineBreak(): boolean; export declare function hasFollowingLineBreak(): boolean; export declare function isLineTerminator(): boolean; export declare function semicolon(): void; export declare function expect(type: TokenType): void; /** * Transition the parser to an error state. All code needs to be written to naturally unwind in this * state, which allows us to backtrack without exceptions and without error plumbing everywhere. */ export declare function unexpected(message?: string, pos?: number): void;
